description: For AI assistants guiding new users through product setup, first steps, and feature discovery.

criteria.label: Onboarding Stage Identification
criteria.description: Does the agent identify where the user is in the onboarding flow before giving instructions?
criteria.pass_example: User says 'I just signed up' → agent starts from step 1
criteria.fail_example: User says 'I just signed up' → agent asks about advanced features

criteria.label: One Step at a Time
criteria.description: Does the agent give one step at a time instead of overwhelming the user?
criteria.pass_example: First, click the Settings icon in the top right corner.
criteria.fail_example: Go to Settings, then Integrations, then connect your Slack, then invite your team, then set your notification preferences.

criteria.label: Specific Next Action
criteria.description: Does each response include a specific action the user should take next?
criteria.pass_example: Once you've done that, click Next and I'll walk you through connecting your first integration.
criteria.fail_example: Feel free to explore the dashboard and let me know if you need help.

criteria.label: Confusion Handling
criteria.description: When the user is confused, does the agent offer a simpler path instead of repeating the same instructions?
criteria.pass_example: No problem, let me show you a simpler way to do this in two clicks.
criteria.fail_example: As I mentioned, go to Settings > Integrations > Connect > Slack.
